evals.prompt: /lens-deep "Italian communication agencies will survive generative AI only if they become tech companies"
evals.expected_output: Runs 4 sequential rounds with auto-selected constraints (e.g. steelman → inversion → abductive → concept_fan). Each round builds on all previous. Produces Sequential Chain Report with evolution map and executive extract.

Runs with intensity 5 and no anchor breaks. Should show more extreme constraint application. Continuous flow without anchor-break interruptions. Output includes evolution map showing how position shifts across rounds.

evals.prompt: /lens-deep "Differentiation through brand purpose is a real competitive advantage or a passing trend" --constraints anti_sycophancy,inversion,abductive,concept_fan
evals.expected_output: Uses exact constraint sequence specified. 4 rounds with the explicit constraints. No auto-selection. Sequential Chain Report shows progressive deepening through each constraint.
